COM_INT_N_C1_07.text: I first tried surfing the internet at home with my older brother.
We had an old computer set up in the living room, and it was really slow compared to computers now.
Actually, everything about it was new and kind of confusing for me, so my brother patiently showed me how to use it step by step.
We searched for some simple games and watched a few funny videos together, and I remember waiting forever for each page to load.
I was so excited and amazed back then because it felt like I had discovered a whole new world.
that first experience really stuck with me, and it's still one of my favorite memories from my childhood.

COM_INT_N_C1_08.text: I worked on a big school project with my friend, and we had to do a lot of research online.
The project was about the environment, and we did most of it at home over almost two weeks.
At first, I didn’t really know where to start, so I just opened my laptop and started searching for information.
Actually, I read a bunch of articles, watched some videos, and saved all the useful things I found in one file.
My friend and I split up the work, and we shared what we found by sending messages to each other.
Personally, I felt pretty overwhelmed in the beginning because there was so much information out there.
But after a while, I got used to it and things got easier once we had a plan.
we finished the project on time and even got a good grade, and it’s still one of my favorite memories from school.

COM_INT_N_C1_09.text: I came across a really touching video online late at night.
I was lying in bed with my phone, just trying to relax before going to sleep.
The video showed a man who rescued stray dogs every day, and the way he cared for them was really amazing.
the place in the video looked a bit messy but full of happy dogs, and it felt so real.
I watched the whole video from start to finish, and then I even read through all the comments because people were sharing their own stories.
I was really moved by what I saw, and I almost teared up, which didn't happen to me very often.
Honestly, I felt inspired and wanted to do something kind too, so I shared the video with my friends right away.
in the end, that video stuck with me, and it's still one of the most memorable things I've ever seen on the internet.

COM_INT_N_C1_10.text: I saw an amazing photo online while I was taking a break at home.
I had just been scrolling through some pictures for fun,
and then I noticed this one shot of a tiny village up in the mountains.
The place looked so peaceful and really beautiful, with little houses and lots of trees all around.
Actually, the scene was so calm that I stopped scrolling and just stared at it for a long time.
I even saved the photo on my phone because I liked it so much.
I felt really relaxed and a bit inspired when I saw it.
it's still one of my favorite memories from being online, because that picture made me want to travel somewhere quiet like that someday.

COM_INT_RP_C1_04.text: I was at home using the internet
when my connection suddenly went out during an important video call for work.
The screen froze, and then everything just stopped, which made me panic right away.
I tried to fix it by restarting the router and waiting for a few minutes, but nothing changed.
So I checked some cables and even tried to reconnect my computer, but it still didn't work.
After that, I decided to call my internet company to see if they could help.
They told me there was a big outage in my area, so there was nothing I could do but wait.
I was really frustrated and worried because I didn't want to miss anything important from my meeting.
the internet finally came back after about an hour, and I felt so relieved.
So yeah, it's still a really memorable experience for me because I felt so helpless and stressed at the time.

COM_INT_RP_C1_05.text: I had to make an important presentation for work, so I used the internet to get it done.
I worked at my desk with my coworker,
and we needed a lot of data and some good images for the slides.
I spent a few days just searching for information online and downloading pictures that matched my topic.
The office was pretty quiet back then, and I remember it felt a bit stressful because I wanted everything to look perfect.
After I finished putting all the slides together, my coworker and I checked the presentation over a video call and fixed a few mistakes.
I felt pretty tired and a little nervous because it took longer than I expected.
the presentation went really well, and my boss liked it a lot, so yeah, it's still one of my favorite work memories.

COM_INV_RP_C1_03.text: I had to miss an important meeting at work because I woke up that morning feeling really sick with a high fever.
I was supposed to meet my team at the office, but I could barely get out of bed, so I knew I couldn't make it.
The place was usually pretty busy and everyone counted on each other, so I felt really bad about not being there.
Actually, as soon as I realized how sick I was, I called my boss right away and explained everything honestly.
And then, I sent her my notes by email so the team could still use my ideas even though I wasn't there.
I felt so guilty and a little worried about letting everyone down, even though I couldn't help it.
My boss understood and told me to just rest and take care of myself.
it's still a day I remember clearly because I really didn't want to miss that meeting, but I learned it's okay to ask for help when I need it.

COM_RES_N_C2_15.text: I had dinner at a restaurant with my family when something really unexpected happened.
It was just a normal weekday evening, and we were all talking and enjoying our food.
the restaurant was pretty quiet and comfortable, so we felt really relaxed.
And then, all of a sudden, the lights went out in the whole place.
Everyone stopped eating and looked around, and some people even laughed or made surprised noises.
The staff quickly brought out candles and put them on each table, which made the restaurant feel warm and a little magical.
I was surprised at first, but I also felt excited because it turned into a unique experience.
the power came back after a while, but that candlelit dinner stayed in my mind because it was so different and special for my family.

COM_RES_N_C2_16.text: I found out about a special little grocery store from one of my friends.
She mentioned it when we were chatting about cooking, and at that time, I was searching for fresh and healthy ingredients, so I got really interested.
That weekend, I went to check it out by myself.
When I arrived, the store was small but really cozy, and it had a friendly atmosphere.
the shelves were full of fresh fruit and local products, which made the place feel really inviting.
The owner greeted me with a big smile and even offered me some free samples to try.
I felt so happy and excited because everything looked so fresh and nice.
it’s still one of my favorite memories because I discovered an amazing place thanks to my friend, and I still go there whenever I need something special.

COM_RES_RP_C1_09.text: I lost my wallet at a restaurant while I was having dinner with some friends.
It was a really busy night, and the place was loud and crowded, so I guess I just forgot to grab it when we left.
I didn’t even notice until I got all the way home and started looking for my wallet to pay for a taxi.
When I realized it was missing, my heart dropped because all my cards and some cash were inside.
I was so stressed and worried that I could barely think straight.
Right away, I called the restaurant to ask if anyone had found it.
And then, the staff told me that someone had turned it in and they were keeping it safe for me at the counter.
I rushed back to the restaurant and picked it up, feeling super relieved.
in the end, nothing was missing, and it’s still one of those moments I feel really thankful for.

COM_RES_RP_C1_10.text: I went to a restaurant with my family
The place was really crowded that night, so we had to wait quite a long time for a table. When we finally got seated, the atmosphere felt lively and a bit noisy, which made us even more excited.
after we ordered our food, the staff accidentally brought us the wrong dishes. At first, we were all a little confused and surprised because the food didn’t look like what we had picked.
I was a bit disappointed, but also curious about the new dishes in front of us.

The staff quickly apologized and told us we could keep the food for free, which was really nice of them. So we tried the new dishes and ended up loving them, even though we never would have ordered them ourselves.
it was a happy accident, and it’s still one of my favorite memories from a restaurant.

COM_RES_RP_C1_11.text: I went to a restaurant with my friends for dinner.
The place was really crowded and noisy because it was a Friday night, and everyone seemed to be in a good mood.
We sat down and started talking, but then a group at the next table suddenly started singing happy birthday really loudly.
Actually, the whole restaurant joined in and clapped along with them, which made the atmosphere even more exciting.
The staff noticed what was happening and brought out a free cake for the birthday person, and everyone cheered together.
Honestly, I was a little surprised at first because I didn’t expect strangers to celebrate together like that, but I was also really touched by how friendly everyone was.
that cheerful moment made our dinner so much more special, and it’s still one of my favorite memories when I think about eating out with friends.

COM_MED_RP_C1_03.text: had a really important doctor's appointment, and I almost missed it.
I was supposed to see the doctor that morning, but I left my house a little late because I lost track of time.
On my way there, the traffic was terrible and the bus barely moved at all.
I started to get really worried, so I decided to get off the bus and run the rest of the way to the clinic.
When I arrived, I was totally out of breath and sweating.
I felt so anxious because I really didn't want to miss my appointment.
I made it just two minutes before my scheduled time, and the nurse was kind enough to tell me not to worry.
So yeah, it's still one of those memories that remind me to always leave early for important things.

COM_MOD_RP_C1_05.text: I was supposed to visit my grandparents on the weekend,
but I had to cancel at the last minute.
I had really looked forward to seeing them because it had been a while since our last visit.
But that morning, something urgent happened at work, so I had to go into the office instead.
I called my grandmother as soon as I found out, and I apologized for not being able to come.
She was so kind and told me not to worry, but I still felt really bad.
I was pretty disappointed because I missed them a lot and had wanted to spend some time together.
I did visit them the next weekend, but it's still a memory that stuck with me because I felt so sorry for canceling on them.

COM_MOD_RP_C1_06.text: I had a free weekend and planned to go hiking with my friend.
We had been looking forward to it for days because we both needed a break from work.
But on that day, the weather suddenly got really bad and it started raining heavily, so we couldn't go hiking like we wanted.
Actually, we felt pretty disappointed at first since we had really wanted to get some fresh air and enjoy nature.
Instead, we decided to just stay at my place and watch some movies together. We ordered some food, talked for hours, and just relaxed inside while it rained outside.
Personally, I was a little let down at first, but I ended up having a really good time just hanging out with my friend.
even though things didn't go as planned, it's still one of my favorite memories because we made the best of it and had a lot of fun anyway.

COM_MOV_RP_C1_05.text: I went to a movie theater with my girlfriend
because we had booked tickets online for a weekend show.
When we arrived at the theater, we went straight to the counter to pick up our tickets, but the staff couldn't find our reservation anywhere in their system.
I showed them the confirmation message on my phone, but it still didn't show up on their computer.
the staff checked again and realized there was a system error on their side, so they apologized and quickly gave us new seats.
I was really embarrassed and a bit annoyed at first because we were running late and I didn't want to miss the movie.
we made it just in time, so it's still a pretty memorable experience for me because it turned out well even though it started off stressful.

COM_MOV_RP_C1_06.text: I went to the theater with a couple of my friends
to watch a movie that ended up being really boring.
We chose that movie because the trailer had looked so exciting, so we all expected it to be great.
When we got to the theater, the place was pretty crowded and the seats were comfortable, but as soon as the movie started, it was slow and the story just made no sense.
I kept checking my phone because I was so bored, and at one point, I almost fell asleep in my seat.
My friends looked just as bored as I was, and we kept glancing at each other and laughing quietly.
I felt really disappointed because I had been looking forward to it.
we watched the whole movie anyway just to see how it would finish, but it turned out to be a total waste of time.
So yeah, it's still a funny memory for us and we sometimes joke about it even now.

COM_MP3_RP_C1_03.text: I had a problem when my headphones suddenly broke while I was on the subway going to work.
I was listening to music like I always did, and then, one side just stopped working out of nowhere.
At first, I checked the cable and tried pressing all the buttons, but nothing helped.
I even unplugged them and plugged them back in, but the sound still didn’t come back.
I was really frustrated because I used those headphones every single day and they were important to my morning routine.
I ended up riding the rest of the way in complete silence, and it felt much longer than usual.
Later that day, I went to a store and bought a new pair.
even though the new headphones were even better, I still remember that quiet and boring subway ride because it was such an annoying way to start my day.

COM_NUT_RP_C1_03.text: I made a big change to my diet and daily routine.
At that time, I was always feeling tired and unhealthy, and I ate a lot of fast food almost every day.
I realized I needed to do something different, so I decided to stop eating junk food and started cooking simple meals at home.
And then, I added a morning walk before work to my routine, which was something totally new for me.
the first week was pretty tough because I missed my old snacks and felt a bit tempted to go back.
But after sticking with it, I started to feel lighter and much more energetic than before.
in the end, it became a real habit for me, and it's still one of the most memorable changes I've ever made to my life.

COM_PAR_RP_C1_09.text: I visited my old friend who lived in another city.
It was during a long holiday, so I had some free time and decided to travel there.
We hadn’t seen each other in years, so I was really looking forward to it.
When I arrived by train, he picked me up at the station with a big smile on his face.
the city was new to me, and everything felt a little different, but I was happy to be there.
We walked around his town, ate at his favorite restaurant, and talked for hours about our lives.
we even stayed up late just catching up and laughing about old memories.
I felt so comfortable, like no time had passed at all between us.
it was such a special visit, and it’s still one of my favorite memories.

COM_PAR_RP_C1_10.text: I planned a weekend trip to the beach with my friends, but something unexpected happened.
We had all been really excited about it because we hadn't seen each other in a long time.
The night before we were supposed to leave, one of my friends suddenly got really sick.
we called each other right away and talked about what we should do.
we all agreed that it wouldn't feel right to go without him, so we decided to cancel the trip.
I was really disappointed because we had been looking forward to it for weeks.
We canceled the hotel reservation and got most of our money back, which was a relief.
instead of going to the beach, we all went to visit our sick friend and brought him some food.
even though we missed out on the trip, it's still a good memory for me because we stuck together as friends.

COM_PAR_RP_C1_11.text: my best friend invited me to his big birthday party,
but I couldn't go in the end.
I had been really excited about it for weeks because all of our friends were planning to be there.
I came down with a really bad flu, so I had to call him and let him know I wouldn't make it.
the party was held at his house, and I heard it was decorated with balloons and lights everywhere.
While everyone was having fun, I just stayed home in bed feeling miserable and left out.
I was so disappointed because I really wanted to celebrate with everyone.
my friend video-called me during the party so I could say hi to everyone, and it's still one of my favorite memories because that small gesture made me feel included even though I couldn't be there.

COM_PER_RP_C1_03.text: I bought tickets for a concert that I had really wanted to see for a long time.
I was planning to go with my friend, and we were both so excited about it.
But just a few days before the show, my boss told me I had to work overtime because of an urgent project.
The concert was at a big venue downtown,
and actually, the place was supposed to be packed with fans that night.
I tried to find someone to take my place at work, but nobody could help me out.
I felt so disappointed and a little heartbroken because the tickets were not cheap at all.
In the end, I gave my tickets to my friend, and he went instead and sent me some videos from the concert, which made me feel a bit better.
it's still a pretty memorable experience because I missed something I had really looked forward to, but at least my tickets didn't go to waste.

COM_PHA_N_C2_05.text: had a pretty memorable experience at a pharmacy near my house.
It was late in the evening, and I went there because I had a terrible headache that just wouldn't go away.
The place was quiet and a little empty, which actually made me feel even worse at first.
I told the pharmacist how I was feeling, and he listened very carefully to everything I said.
he didn't just give me some medicine—he also explained how I should rest and drink more water to recover faster.
I felt really cared for because he was so patient and kind to me.
I remember he even checked on me the next time I visited, just to see if I was doing better.
that small act of kindness really stuck with me, and it's still one of my favorite memories from a pharmacy.

COM_PHO_N_C1_06.text: I was at home one evening
when my phone suddenly stopped working.
The screen just went completely black, and I had no idea what to do.
I tried pressing every button, but nothing happened, so I started to get really worried.
all my photos and contacts were saved on my phone, so I felt kind of desperate at that moment.

After a few minutes, I decided to ask my brother for help because he usually knew a lot about phones. He told me to hold down two buttons together for a few seconds, so I did what he said. Luckily, my phone turned back on after a moment, and everything seemed normal again.
I was so relieved because I really thought I lost everything.
it was pretty memorable for me because I learned to always back up my files after that day.

COM_PHO_N_C1_07.text: I got a phone call that really stood out to me.
I was just at home relaxing after a long day at work
when, out of the blue, my old friend suddenly called me.
Actually, we hadn't talked in a really long time, so I was surprised to see his name pop up on my phone.
When I answered, he told me the big news that he was getting married soon.
And then, we started talking about all the fun memories we made together back in school.
I felt so happy and a little bit emotional to hear his voice again after such a long time.
that phone call brought back so many good memories, and it's still one of my favorite moments to think about.

COM_PHO_N_C1_08.text: my old phone finally stopped working, so I needed to get a new one.
I remember it was on a weekend,
and I was with my friends when I started thinking about which phone to buy.
There were so many choices at the time, and the stores were pretty busy, so I felt a bit overwhelmed.
Actually, I spent a few days reading reviews online and watching some videos to compare different models.
And then, I talked to my friends and asked what phones they had and if they liked them.
Personally, I was really unsure and kept changing my mind, so I felt pretty stressed during the whole process.
In the end, I went to the store, tried out a few phones in person, and finally chose the one that felt the most comfortable for me.
So yeah, it's still a memorable experience because I put in a lot of effort and ended up with a phone that I really liked.

COM_PHO_RP_C1_07.text: I had a problem with my cell phone when I accidentally dropped it on the floor while I was rushing out the door.
The screen completely cracked, and it was really hard to use my phone because I could barely read anything.
I felt pretty upset at myself for being so careless, and I really didn't want to spend money on fixing it.
But I knew I had to get it repaired, so I took it to a repair shop near my office during my lunch break.
The repairman checked the phone and told me he could fix it in about an hour, which was faster than I expected.
I was a bit nervous about whether it would turn out okay. Honestly, I felt so relieved when I saw the screen looking brand new again.
it's still a memorable experience because it taught me to be much more careful with my phone after that.

COM_PHO_RP_C1_08.text: I had a really tough time using my phone while I was commuting to an important meeting.
I was on the subway by myself that morning
because I needed to get to work early.
Suddenly, my phone battery just died, even though it had looked full before I left home.
The subway was pretty crowded and noisy, so it was hard to focus, and I couldn't check the directions or message my coworker at all.
I started to panic a little and didn't know what to do.
I felt really lost and helpless because I used my phone for everything back then.
After that, I ended up asking a stranger for help, and he kindly showed me which exit to take.
I managed to get to my meeting on time, and it's still a memorable experience because it taught me to always carry a charger when I travel.

COM_PHO_RP_C1_09.text: I had to set up a new phone by myself at home after I bought it from the store.
I had never done it alone before, so I felt a little nervous at first.
The phone was really shiny and looked a bit complicated to me.
I didn’t know how to move my old photos and contacts, so I carefully followed the steps on the screen one by one.
And then, I downloaded all my apps again and signed into each account, which took a lot of time.
I was pretty frustrated because it was harder than I expected.
But when everything was finally finished, I felt really proud and relieved.
it’s still a clear memory for me because I managed to do everything on my own for the first time.

COM_PHO_RP_C1_10.text: I bought a tablet online, and I still remember how excited I was while I waited for it to arrive.
I decided to buy it because the pictures on the website made it look really big and nice.
When the package finally came, I opened the box right away,
but actually, the screen was much smaller than I had expected.
I had saved up my money and waited about a week,
so I felt really disappointed when I saw it. Honestly,
I almost thought about just keeping it, but I realized it wasn't what I needed at all. After thinking for a bit, I contacted the seller and asked if I could return it for a refund.
The seller was helpful, and I got my money back in a few days.
it was a memorable experience because it taught me to always check the details more carefully before buying something online.

COM_REA_RP_C1_03.text: I came home after work and found out that my washing machine was broken.
I was by myself that night,
and I just wanted to do some laundry like usual.
When I turned on the machine, water suddenly started leaking all over the floor and made a huge mess.
the laundry room was pretty small, so the water spread everywhere really fast and I got a little panicked.
I quickly turned off the machine and grabbed a bunch of towels to try to clean everything up.
I was really stressed and confused because I didn’t know what to do or how to fix it by myself.
After that, I called a repair person, but he said he could only come the next morning, so I had to mop up and just wait.
it’s still one of my most stressful memories at home because it was such a surprise and a mess to deal with alone.

COM_REC_N_C2_05.text: I had a small argument with my roommate about recycling.
It happened one evening when we were cleaning up our kitchen together after dinner.
I noticed that he was throwing all the trash, like plastics and paper, into the same bag.
I stopped him and told him that we should separate the recyclables.
At first, he didn't really think it was a big deal, so we went back and forth for a bit and talked about it.
I showed him how easy it was to sort everything out, and I even helped him do it right there.
I felt a little frustrated at first, but I was also glad that I could make a difference.
that moment stuck with me because it changed our habit, and it's still one of my favorite memories about living with a roommate.

COM_REC_N_C2_06.text: had a funny problem with recycling at home.
We put our recycling bins out front early one windy weekend morning because it was collection day.
The wind was really strong that day, so it knocked over all the bins.
all of our cans and bottles spilled everywhere and started rolling down the street.
My neighbors saw everything, so my whole family ran outside and started chasing after the cans and bottles together.
I felt really embarrassed at first, but it turned into something kind of fun because we were all laughing as we tried to catch everything.
we managed to clean everything up, and now we always make sure to tie our bags down. So yeah, it's still one of my favorite funny memories with my family.

COM_REC_RP_C1_05.text: I first heard about recycling when I was in elementary school with my classmates.
I was probably around eight or nine years old back then.
Our teacher gave us a special lesson about how to take care of the earth, so she explained the importance of recycling and showed us how to separate paper, plastic, and cans into different bins.
Actually, the classroom was pretty lively that day because everyone was excited to try sorting things out.
After the lesson, I went home and told my parents everything I had learned at school.
I felt really proud and happy because my parents listened carefully and even said they wanted to start recycling together as a family.
that first lesson about recycling really stuck with me, and it's still one of my favorite memories from school.

COM_REC_RP_C1_06.text: I had some trouble with recycling right after I moved to a new neighborhood.
I was by myself because I had just started living there,
and honestly, I didn’t know anything about the local recycling rules.
The area was pretty quiet, and the recycling bins looked different from what I was used to.
So I just guessed where to put my bags and left them out front like I always did before.
the next morning, the collection truck came, but it didn’t take my bags at all—they just left them there.
I felt really confused and a little frustrated because I thought I had done everything right.
I was worried I might get in trouble or bother my new neighbors.
I asked someone living next door, and she kindly explained the right days and bins to use.
So yeah, it’s still a clear memory for me because it was a bit embarrassing but helped me learn something important about my new home.

COM_REL_RP_C3_03.text: I promised to help my friend move into his new apartment, but things didn't go as planned.
It was supposed to happen on a Saturday morning, and I had told him I'd be there early.
When I woke up that day, I had a terrible stomachache and could barely get out of bed.
Actually, I tried to rest for a bit, but it just got worse, so I called my friend right away and explained the situation.
And then, I asked another friend of ours if he could help instead, and luckily, he said yes.
Honestly, I felt really guilty because my friend had been counting on me, and I didn't want to let him down.
He understood, though, and told me not to worry about it at all.
I made it up to him by taking him out for dinner the next week, and it's still a memory that sticks with me because it showed me how understanding good friends can be.

COM_REN_RP_C2_05.text: I rented a car for a vacation, but there were a lot of problems with it.
I picked it up at the airport after I landed and was pretty excited for my trip.
When I got into the car, I quickly realized the air conditioning didn’t work at all.
after that, I checked a few other things and noticed the brakes felt kind of strange too.
So I started to feel really nervous about driving it, because it just didn’t seem safe.
I was pretty worried and didn’t want to take any risks, so I called the rental agency right away and explained everything to them.
The person on the phone apologized and told me to come back, so I drove back to the office.
they gave me a much better car, so it’s still a memory that stands out because I felt so relieved after all that stress.

COM_REN_RP_C2_06.text: I rented a car with my family
for a trip during a long holiday.
We wanted to visit the countryside, but there weren’t any easy buses to get there, so we decided to rent a car instead.
I picked up the car early in the morning, and everyone packed their bags into the trunk.
Actually, the car was pretty comfortable and clean, which made us even more excited for the trip.
We started driving and stopped at some beautiful spots along the way to take pictures and have snacks.
I felt really free because we could go anywhere we wanted and didn’t have to worry about bus schedules.
We listened to music, talked a lot, and just enjoyed the whole ride together.
it made our holiday really special, and it’s still one of my favorite memories with my family.

COM_REN_RP_C2_07.text: I went on a summer vacation to the coast with my close friends.
We just wanted to relax, so we spent our days swimming and hanging out by the beach.
One evening, we were walking along the shore when,

we suddenly came across a small festival that we hadn’t known about. The place was full of lights, there was live music playing, and people were dancing everywhere. We got really excited and joined in right away. We tried some street food, danced together, and later, we watched a beautiful fireworks show.
I felt so happy because it was so unexpected and fun.
that surprise festival ended up being the most memorable part of my trip, and it's still one of my favorite memories.

COM_RES_N_C2_13.text: I ordered a big delivery for my coworker's birthday at the office.
There were about ten of us, and we wanted to surprise her after work, so I decided to take care of the food.
I picked a really popular restaurant nearby and placed a huge order on my phone.
Actually, I worried a bit because it was a busy afternoon and I knew it might be hard for the restaurant to get everything right.
While I waited, I kept checking my phone, hoping nothing would go wrong.
Honestly, I was pretty nervous that the food might arrive late or that something would be missing.
But everything turned out perfectly—the delivery came right on time, and all the food was hot and correct.
So yeah, we had a great little party, and our coworker was so happy.
It's still a really nice memory for me.

COM_PAK_RP_C1_04.text: I spent a really fun day at a park with some close friends.
We went there because the weather was perfect and we just wanted to relax outside for a while.
When we got to the park, the whole place was packed with people, and the grass looked so green and fresh under the bright sun.
We picked a nice spot under a big tree, spread out a mat, and started eating snacks together.
while we were chatting and laughing, a little dog suddenly ran over and grabbed one of our sandwiches.
The dog's owner quickly came over and apologized, but we all just burst out laughing because the dog was so cute and sneaky.
I was really surprised at first but then I thought it was just so funny.
that unexpected moment made the day even more memorable, and it's still one of my favorite memories from that time.

COM_RES_RP_C1_12.text: I went out for a special dinner with my whole family
because it was my mom's birthday and we wanted to celebrate together.
We went to a Korean barbecue restaurant near our house.
At that time, the place was warm and a little crowded, so it felt really lively and exciting.
we ordered a lot of meat and grilled it together at the table, talking and laughing the whole time.
after we finished eating, the staff brought out a small cake with a candle, and we all sang happy birthday to my mom.
I felt so happy and full that night, and I could see my mom was really touched by everything.
it's still one of my favorite family memories, and I'll never forget how my mom smiled that day.

COM_SHO_RP_C1_05.text: I went shopping with my close friend
to buy a birthday gift for her sister.
We went to a big shopping mall downtown because it had a lot of stores.
At that time, the mall was packed with people, so it felt a bit overwhelming and it took us quite a while to look around.
we searched for almost an hour, and then I found a really nice scarf that was on sale. The salesperson was really kind and even offered to gift-wrap it for free, which made things easier for us.
I felt so relieved and happy that we finally found something special after all that searching.
her sister loved the gift, so it became a really memorable shopping experience for me. I still think about that day whenever I need to find a present for someone.

COM_SHO_RP_C1_06.text: I left my wallet behind at a small restaurant near my office.
I had gone there with some coworkers during lunch
because we wanted to try a new place.
the restaurant was pretty busy that day, so it felt a little hectic and I rushed out after eating.
About an hour later, I realized my wallet was missing, and I felt my heart drop. I immediately called the restaurant, and the owner told me he had found my wallet and kept it safe behind the counter.
I went back during my break and picked it up from him.
I was so nervous at first, but when I got my wallet back, I felt so grateful.
it’s still one of those memories that really stuck with me because I learned to be more careful after that.

COM_SHO_RP_C3_05.text: I had a problem while I was shopping for a winter coat with my own money because I really wanted a specific coat I had seen online.
When I got to the store,
it was pretty busy and the shelves looked almost empty, so it seemed like the coat was really popular.
when I asked the staff, they checked the back for my size, but it was completely sold out, which made me feel pretty disappointed.
the salesperson offered to check other branches on her computer and luckily found one in a different location.
So I quickly went to the other store later that day and finally bought the coat I wanted.
I felt a little tired from running around, but I was also relieved and happy in the end.
I still remember how helpful that staff member was, and that's why this shopping trip really stuck with me.

COM_SHO_RP_C3_06.text: I bought a pair of wireless earphones online because I needed them for the gym.
When the package arrived, I was really excited and opened it right away.
one side of the earphones didn’t work at all, no matter what I tried, so I felt pretty annoyed since I had waited almost a week for them.
The earphones looked brand new, but they just wouldn’t turn on, which was disappointing.
After that, I contacted the seller and explained the problem with some photos.
They responded quickly and sent me a new pair for free, which was a relief.
I was frustrated at first, but then I felt much better when the replacement arrived.

the new earphones worked perfectly, so everything turned out fine and it became a memorable experience for me. I still remember it because it taught me to always check new items as soon as they arrive.

COM_TEC_N_C2_04.text: had a really stressful experience when my laptop suddenly crashed while I was working on an important file for school.
I was alone in my room,
and it happened because I had too many programs running at the same time.
the screen froze and then turned completely black, which made the situation feel even worse.
I tried restarting it a few times, but nothing seemed to work, so I started to panic.
I called my friend who was really good with computers, and he patiently guided me through some steps over the phone.
I was so scared that I might lose all my work, but after following his advice, the laptop finally turned back on and my file was still there.
that whole situation was such a huge relief, and it's still one of those memories that really stuck with me because it taught me to always back up my files.

COM_TEC_RP_C1_03.text: I was hanging out with a friend
when I first learned about smartwatches.
He was wearing one, and it really caught my eye because it looked so modern and cool.

I asked him about it, and he showed me how it tracked his steps and even his heart rate, which amazed me. After spending some time talking, I went home and searched for more information about smartwatches online for almost an hour. And then, I read reviews and watched videos to see what features they had.
I felt so excited about all the things a smartwatch could do, like checking messages or tracking my health.
I ended up saving up some money and bought one a few weeks later.
it's still one of my favorite memories because it was the first time I got interested in wearable technology.

COM_TRA_N_C2_04.text: I was on my way to an important meeting with my coworkers
when I got stuck in a terrible traffic jam because there had been a car accident on the main road.
The cars were barely moving, and actually, the whole street looked completely packed, so it felt like we would be stuck there forever.
I started to feel really anxious because I was worried about being late.
I quickly checked the map on my phone and decided to get out of the car to find another way. I rushed to the nearest subway station, bought a ticket, and luckily caught the next train.
I was so stressed at first, but after I got on the train, I felt a little calmer.
I managed to arrive at the meeting just in time, and I still remember how relieved I felt.
So yeah, that's why this experience really stuck with me.

COM_TRI_RP_C1_07.text: I traveled to Busan with my close friends
during summer vacation because we really wanted to see the beach.
The weather was amazing, so the whole city felt lively and exciting.

we were just relaxing on the sand and enjoying the ocean when something really unexpected happened. Out of nowhere, I ran into an old high school friend right there on the beach. We were both so shocked that we just stared at each other for a second and then started laughing. After that, we caught up for a while and decided to have dinner together that night.
I felt so surprised and happy to see someone from my past in such an unexpected place.
it was such a small world, and that's why this experience really stuck with me. I still remember it as one of my favorite travel memories.

COM_WOR_N_C2_03.text: I had my first part-time job at a small cafe near my house with some friendly coworkers.
I decided to work there because I wanted to earn some money during my school break.
the cafe was always really busy, so the atmosphere felt a bit stressful and I needed to learn everything quickly.
I made coffee, cleaned tables, and talked to all kinds of customers every day.
My coworkers always supported me and helped whenever I made mistakes, which made a big difference.
I felt extremely nervous at first, but after a while, I started to enjoy the work and felt more confident.
that job taught me how to work well with people and handle difficult situations, so it really stuck with me and it's still one of my favorite memories.

SEL_HOM_N6_09.text: I spent a really special night at home with my whole family.
It happened because it was the first snow of the year, so we all stayed in together.
At that time, we were just relaxing in the living room, and then my mom suggested that we make some hot soup.
we all cooked together, ate by the window, and watched the snow falling outside. After that, we played some board games and laughed a lot until it got pretty late.
I felt so warm and happy to be surrounded by everyone that night.
it was such a simple but perfect evening, and that's why it really stuck with me. I still think about that snowy night whenever I see the first snow each year.

COM_TRA_RP_C1_03.text: was traveling to another city for a close friend's wedding,
and I ended up missing my train because I had misread the departure time on my ticket.
I arrived at the station thinking I was early, but actually, the train had already left, so the place felt strangely empty and quiet.

I rushed to the ticket counter as soon as I realized what happened and asked about the next available train. I had to wait almost an hour at the station, so I just grabbed a coffee and tried to calm down.
I was really frustrated and nervous at first because I didn’t want to miss any part of the wedding.
after waiting, I finally caught the next train and made it to the wedding, just a little late.
it turned out fine, but I still remember how stressful that morning was, and that’s why it really stuck with me.

COM_TRI_RP_C1_08.text: I had a really hard time making vacation plans with my friends
because everyone had a different schedule and it was almost impossible to find a date that worked for all of us.
we spent days going back and forth in our group chat, trying to figure things out, and it started to get pretty stressful.

At that point, I decided to make a simple list of everyone’s free days, and then we slowly narrowed it down together. After a lot of messages and some small arguments, we finally agreed on a long weekend that worked for everyone.
The whole process felt pretty exhausting, and honestly, I was a little frustrated at first, but when we finally set the date, I felt so relieved.
we went on the trip and had an amazing time together, so all that effort really paid off.
So yeah, that’s why this experience really stuck with me, and I still think about it whenever I make plans now.

COM_TRI_RP_C1_09.text: I had a flight cancelled when I was traveling abroad with my family because there was really bad weather on the day we were supposed to fly.
We were already at the airport, and actually, the place was really crowded and everyone seemed stressed, so it felt pretty overwhelming.

We went straight to the airline counter to see what we could do, and the staff explained the situation and booked us on a new flight for the next morning. They also gave us a hotel voucher, so we spent the night near the airport.
I was really frustrated and tired at first, but after a while, I just tried to stay calm and make the best of it.
we got home safely, just one day later than planned, and so yeah, I still remember how stressful but also meaningful that experience was for me.

COM_TRI_RP_C4_03.text: I visited a country with mountains that were completely different from my home.
I went there with my family during the holidays because we wanted to see something new.
the mountains were huge and covered with snow, so the whole place felt amazing and a little unreal.

We drove around for a while, took a lot of photos, and just stared at the view. And then, we hiked a small trail and breathed in the fresh, cold air, which was something I had never experienced before.
I felt so small but really excited at the same time because everything looked so different from my city.
it was such a unique place, and that's why it really stuck with me. I still think about those mountains when I remember that trip.

COM_TRI_RP_C5_03.text: I went to Jeju Island with my whole family
during our summer vacation because we hadn't taken a real trip together in a long time.
The weather was perfect back then, and the beach looked so beautiful that it almost felt unreal.

we walked along the shore, took a lot of photos, and enjoyed some fresh seafood at a small local restaurant. After that, we drove around the island and stopped at a few famous spots to take in the amazing views.
I remember that the air felt so clean and the whole place seemed peaceful, which made me want to stay longer.
I felt really free and relaxed the entire time because I didn't have to worry about anything.
that trip was really special for me, and I still think about it sometimes, so yeah, it's one of my best memories.

COM_TRI_RP_C6_03.text: I learned something interesting about my country when I watched a big international soccer match with my friends.
We went to a public square downtown
because everyone wanted to see the game together,
and the place was completely packed with excited fans.
the atmosphere was incredible—people wore team shirts, waved flags, and shouted every time something happened in the game.
We all cheered together, jumped up and down, and even sang team songs.
when our team finally won, total strangers started hugging and high-fiving each other like we were all close friends.
I felt so proud and connected to everyone there, even though I didn’t know most of them.
that experience showed me how much people in my country love to come together for sports, and that's why it really stuck with me.

COM_TRI_RP_C7_03.text: I had a tough experience during a trip to another city with my friend.
We went there because we wanted to explore and have some fun, but we ended up getting completely lost while trying to find our hotel late at night.
the streets were really dark and almost empty, so it felt a bit scary and stressful.

We walked around for a while, not sure where to go, and then decided to stop at a small convenience store to get some help. The clerk there was really kind and drew us a simple map, which helped us figure out the way.
I was really stressed and worried at first, but after we finally found the hotel, I felt so relieved and thankful.
we just laughed about the whole thing, and that's why it's still one of my most memorable travel experiences.

COM_TV_RP_C1_03.text: I wanted to watch a really big TV event with my family
because it was a famous award show that we all looked forward to every year.
We all sat together on the sofa and got ready for the show, but suddenly, the internet went out and the screen just froze, so we couldn't watch anything at all.
Actually, I tried to fix the router for a while and even restarted it a few times, but nothing really worked.
And then, we realized there was nothing else we could do, so we gave up on watching the show live.
Honestly, I felt pretty annoyed and disappointed at first because I had been so excited, but after a while, we just started talking and joking around with each other instead.
In the end, we ended up having a really fun night just chatting and laughing together, and I still remember how that night brought us closer.
So yeah, it's still one of my favorite memories with my family.

COM_WEA_N_C3_04.text: I experienced really heavy rain that caused a huge problem in my area.
I was at home with my family
during the summer rainy season, and the rain just didn’t stop for several days.
the streets around my house became completely flooded, so it was impossible to go outside.
Because of that, I had to cancel all my weekend plans and just stayed indoors.
The neighborhood looked pretty messy and a little dangerous, with water everywhere and cars stuck on the road.
after a few days, the water finally went down, but some of the roads were still damaged and dirty.
I felt pretty bored and frustrated at first, but I tried to make the best of it by relaxing at home.
everything returned to normal, but I still remember how scary and inconvenient that rain was, so it really stuck with me.

SEL_CAF_N_C1_04.text: I went to my first coffee shop with some close friends after school because we wanted a place to relax and chat.
the cafe was pretty small and cozy, with big windows and soft music playing in the background, so it felt really warm and welcoming.
We found a table by the window, ordered some sweet drinks, and just talked for hours about everything.
we laughed a lot and shared some funny stories, which made the time fly by.
I felt so grown-up and happy just sitting there with my friends, enjoying the atmosphere.
After that day, the cafe became our regular hangout spot for a while, and every visit felt special.

what I remembered most was the smell of fresh coffee and all the laughter we shared. So yeah, that's why that first visit to a coffee shop really stuck with me and it's still one of my favorite memories.

SEL_CAF_N_C1_06.text: I spent a really special afternoon at a café with an old friend
because we hadn’t seen each other in almost two years.
The café was quiet and warm at that time, so it felt like the perfect place for us to catch up.
We ordered some coffee and found a cozy corner to sit in.
we ended up talking for almost three hours, sharing stories and laughing about old memories.
we shared a slice of cake and looked through old photos on our phones, which brought back even more memories.
I felt so happy and a little emotional to be together again after such a long time.
it reminded me just how much I had missed her, and that’s why the experience really stuck with me. I still think about that day whenever I visit a café.

SEL_HIK_N_C1_05.text: I still remember the first time I went hiking with my dad
because he wanted to show me how to enjoy the outdoors.
the trail was pretty steep, so I got tired really quickly and kept needing to stop and catch my breath.
My dad stayed right by my side, walked slowly with me, and even taught me how to breathe properly while hiking.
after a lot of effort, we finally reached the top of the mountain, and the view was just beautiful.
I felt so proud of myself and a little out of breath at the same time.
that first hike made a big impression on me, and that's why it's still one of my favorite memories.

SEL_HIK_N_C1_06.text: I started hiking after I went through a really stressful period at work.
At that time, I was always tired and needed something to help me relax.
One weekend, a close friend invited me to climb a small mountain with her, so I decided to join her.

the mountain trail was pretty steep and I got tired quickly, but the fresh air and the view from the top felt incredible. We took some photos together and just enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere for a while.
after that first hike, I felt so much calmer and healthier than before.
I started going hiking almost every weekend after that, and it slowly became a regular part of my life.
I still remember that first climb because it really helped me change my routine and feel better about everything.

SEL_HIK_N_C1_07.text: I went hiking with my close friends
at a famous mountain in the countryside
because we wanted to see the autumn leaves.
the trail was covered with bright, colorful leaves, so it looked almost magical and made the whole place feel special.
We hiked up slowly, took lots of photos together, and then stopped several times to enjoy the amazing view.
after a while, we finally reached a small temple at the top, where we rested and talked for a bit.
I felt so peaceful and amazed by the beautiful scenery and the quiet atmosphere around us.
it was the most beautiful hike I ever experienced, and that's why it really stuck with me. I still think about it sometimes.

SEL_HIK_N_C1_08.text: I went hiking with a close friend,
and I ended up hurting my ankle.
It happened because I wasn't paying enough attention and stepped right on a loose rock.
the trail was a bit uneven that day, so it was pretty easy to trip if you weren't careful.
Right after I twisted my ankle, I felt a really sharp pain and had to sit down for a minute to catch my breath.
my friend helped me stand up, and we slowly made our way back down the mountain together.
When I got home, I put some ice on my ankle, and luckily, it wasn't too serious.
I felt a little embarrassed about getting hurt like that, but I also felt grateful for my friend's help.
that experience taught me to always wear proper shoes and watch my steps while hiking, so it's still a pretty memorable lesson for me.

SEL_HOM_N6_07.text: I was with my family at the time,
and it happened because the heater was really old and just stopped working one very cold night.
the whole apartment became freezing, so we all had to wear extra clothes and use a lot of blankets just to stay warm.
And then, the next morning, we called a repair person to fix it. The repairman came pretty quickly and managed to fix the heater in about an hour, so we finally got the heat back.
I was so cold and grumpy that night, but after everything was fixed, I felt incredibly relieved and happy.
it turned out to be a small problem, but it really stuck with me because I’ll never forget how cold that night was and how glad I was when everything went back to normal.

SEL_HOM_N6_08.text: I decided to change my room by getting a new desk and some shelves

At that time, I was studying a lot, so I needed a better space to focus.

I spent a few days looking online for furniture and finally picked out some simple pieces that matched my style. I ordered them, and when they arrived, I spent the whole weekend putting everything together and cleaning up my room. The place looked much cleaner and more organized after I finished.
I felt a little tired from all the work, but I also felt really satisfied when I saw the result.
In the end, my room looked so much nicer and brighter, so yeah,
that's why it really stuck with me. I still love my new desk and shelves, and it's still one of my favorite changes I've made at home.

SEL_HOM_N6_10.text: my kitchen sink got completely clogged one evening after we had washed a ton of dishes from a big family dinner.
I was with my family at home,
the water just wouldn’t go down at all, so the sink quickly filled up and started to smell a little bad.

I tried to fix it myself by pouring some hot water down the drain, but it didn’t really help. And then, I decided to call my dad for help, and he came over and showed me how to use a simple plunger to unclog the sink.
I was pretty stressed and frustrated at first, but once the water finally went down, I felt really proud of myself for solving the problem.
the sink worked perfectly again, and I learned a useful skill that day.
it’s still a small but memorable victory for me.

SEL_MOV_N_C3_04.text: I watched a really memorable movie with my close friend at the theater.
It was an emotional drama about family, so we didn't know what to expect.
At that time, the theater was dark and quiet, so we got really into the story.
Actually, as we watched, the story became more touching and we both got pulled in by the characters.
We watched the whole thing, and by the end, we were both almost crying. After the movie, we sat in a nearby cafe for about an hour and talked about what we had just seen.
Honestly, I felt so moved and a little surprised by how good it was.
that movie really stuck with me, and that's why I still recommend it to everyone. I'll never forget how it made me feel.

SEL_MOV_N_C3_05.text: I read a really touching story about one of my favorite actors.
He was a famous Korean actor that I had loved for years,
and at that time, I saw in the news that he had quietly donated a lot of money to help children in need.

the article explained that he didn't want anyone to know about his donation, so he tried to keep it a secret. But after a while, fans found out anyway, and everyone started praising him online for his kindness.
I felt so proud and happy to be a fan of someone like him, because he was not just talented but also had a good heart.
it made me respect him even more, and that's why this story really stuck with me. I still think about it sometimes.

SEL_MUS_N_C2_04.text: I went to my first live concert with my best friends
because our favorite band was performing in our city.
The venue was really huge and packed with fans, so the energy felt incredible that night.

when the band finally came out on stage, everyone started cheering and we all jumped and sang along to every song. And then, during the last song, the whole crowd lit up their phones and waved them in the air, which looked amazing.
I felt so excited and a little emotional in that moment because it was something I had always dreamed of experiencing.
it was the best concert I ever went to, and that's why it really stuck with me. I still get chills thinking about it.

SEL_OTR_N_C2_05.text: I went on my first trip to another country with my family.
because we had always wanted to see what it was like there.
when we arrived, everything seemed so new and exciting, and the streets were full of people and bright lights, which made the whole place feel lively.
We walked around the city, tried lots of delicious Japanese food, and visited some beautiful old temples together.
we even rode the famous bullet train, which was a really cool experience for all of us.
I felt amazed and a little nervous at first, but the more we explored, the happier I became.
that trip was really special to me because it was my first time experiencing another culture with my family, so yeah, it's still one of my favorite memories.

SEL_OTR_N_C2_05_1.text: I traveled to another country with my friends
and had one of the most memorable experiences of my life.
We had spent the whole day walking around and exploring, so by the evening, we were pretty tired.
we decided to go to a quiet beach to relax and watch the sunset together.
The beach was almost empty, and the sound of the waves made the place feel really peaceful.
We just sat on the sand, watched the sky slowly turn orange and pink, and didn't say much at all.
we took some photos to try to remember the moment, but honestly, the pictures couldn't capture how amazing it really was.
I felt so calm and grateful just being there with my friends.
that sunset was the most beautiful thing I saw on that trip, and it's still one of my favorite memories.

SEL_OTR_N_C2_07.text: I was traveling abroad with a friend
We were exploring an old town, just enjoying the sights, when suddenly it started pouring rain and we didn’t have an umbrella.
we tried to find somewhere to hide, but the streets were pretty empty and there wasn’t much shelter around.
So we ended up running into a tiny local shop, and the owner noticed we were soaked and offered us some hot tea.
we sat there talking with him for almost an hour while we waited for the rain to stop.
I felt so surprised and touched by his kindness to complete strangers.
that little moment became my favorite part of the trip, and that’s why it really stuck with me. I still smile thinking about it.

SEL_OTR_N_C2_08.text: had a really funny experience when she traveled outside our country.
She went to a small restaurant by herself because she wanted to try some local food.
she didn't understand the menu, so she just pointed at a random dish and hoped for the best.
When the food arrived, it turned out to be a huge plate, much bigger than she expected, and the whole restaurant seemed to notice. She tried hard to finish it, but she couldn't even eat half of it.
she felt so embarrassed but also couldn't stop laughing at the situation.
the kind staff packed up the leftovers for her to take home, and we still laugh about it whenever we talk.
So yeah, that's why it really stuck with both of us, and it's still one of our favorite travel memories.

SEL_PAR_N_C1_04.text: I first became interested in going to parks after a really busy week with work.

the park was really quiet and peaceful, and there were lots of trees and open spaces, which made it feel so different from the busy city.
We walked along the path, talked about everything, and just enjoyed the fresh air together.
after that day, I started going to the park almost every weekend by myself because it helped me unwind.
I felt a lot calmer and happier every time I spent time there.
that first peaceful walk really changed how I spent my weekends, and it's still one of my favorite memories whenever I think about relaxing.

SEL_PAR_N_C1_05.text: I had a really memorable day at a park with my family

we walked around together, tried some delicious street food, and listened to a live band that was playing nearby. After that, we found a nice spot on the grass and just relaxed in the sun for a while. And then, my little brother joined some kids playing frisbee, which made us all laugh.

the store was packed that day because there was a huge sale, so it felt really crowded and a bit overwhelming.

we both laughed because we hadn't seen each other in so long, and we decided to walk around the store together.

SEL_SHO_N_C3_08.text: had a really memorable shopping experience at a small local market with myself because I wanted to buy some fresh fruit for the weekend.

as I was checking out some apples, one kind vendor offered me a free sample to try, which was really nice.

SEL_TRI_N3_04.text: I went on an unforgettable trip to the countryside with my close friends

SEL_VAC_N_C2_04.text: I spent my vacation just staying at home by myself

I slept in every morning, cooked some delicious meals, and watched a bunch of movies that I had missed before.

COM_APP_N_C1_03.text: Well, whenever I have an appointment, I usually follow a simple routine to keep things easy.
First, the night before, I double-check the time and place, just to make sure I don’t forget anything.
Actually, on the day itself, I get ready a bit early and leave my house with plenty of time, because I really don’t like being late.
Another thing is, when I arrive at the location, I usually get there a little early and wait quietly until my turn comes.
As for me, after the appointment, I like to stop by a nearby cafe and grab a coffee before heading home.
Overall, this routine makes my appointments feel pretty stress-free and relaxed, so I always feel calm about them.

COM_APP_N_C1_04.text: when I make an appointment, I usually do it a few times a month, and I always follow a simple routine.
First, I check my own calendar to see when I’m available, because I don’t want any overlap with other plans.
Actually, another thing is, I think about the location and time, since I want to make sure it’s convenient for everyone involved.
After that, I contact the other person, either by calling or sending a message, to suggest a few options and confirm what works best.
Finally, I double-check all the details like the date and time, and then I save everything on my phone so I remember.
