COM_HAP_N_C1_02.text: Well, one appliance that's really changed for me is the TV.
In the past, the TV I used to have was really big, heavy, and kind of hard to move around. Actually, it only had a few channels, and I had to get up to change them or fix the antenna all the time.
But these days, my TV is thin, light, and super easy to use. Now I can stream anything I want, and I just use a remote or even my voice to control everything.
The biggest difference is that today's TV is much more convenient and has way more features than before.
Overall, as for me, I really love how simple and fun it is to use my TV now. I honestly can't imagine going back to that old style anymore.

COM_HAP_N_C1_04.text: in the past, most appliances used to be pretty simple, and people had to do a lot of things by hand. For example, you had to stand in front of the washing machine and turn it off yourself, or set the oven timer and keep checking it.
But these days, appliances are much smarter and can do things automatically. Now, my robot vacuum cleans the floor by itself, and I can even control my washing machine with my phone.
The biggest difference is that modern appliances save a lot of time and effort compared to older ones.
I think our lives have become much more convenient, and personally, I really appreciate having more free time because of these changes.

COM_HAR_N_C1_07.text: Well, hair trends in my country have really changed over recent years.
In the past, most people used to keep their hair pretty simple and natural, and bright colors were pretty rare.
For example, only a few young people dyed their hair, and most styles looked the same.
But these days, people are a lot more open with their hair. Now you see all kinds of colors, perms, and trendy cuts everywhere.
The biggest difference is that people feel much freer to try new styles now and show their own personality.
Overall, I think it's a nice change.
As for me, even I've gotten a little braver with my own haircuts.

COM_HEA_N_C2_07.text: Well, healthy eating habits have really changed a lot since I was a child.
In the past, people used to just focus on eating home-cooked meals and tried to stay away from junk food.
Actually, nobody really counted calories or cared much about how much protein or fiber they were getting.

But these days, people now pay much more attention to what they eat. For example, a lot of people track their meals on apps, watch their portion sizes, and try to include more vegetables and healthy snacks.
The biggest difference is that eating healthy has become a lot more planned and detailed now.
Overall, I think it's a positive change,
but as for me, sometimes I miss how simple things were before. People didn’t stress so much about food back then.

COM_HEA_N_C2_09.text: Well, our ideas about health have really changed over time.

In the past, staying healthy mostly meant eating regular meals and getting enough sleep. For example, a healthy diet just used to be rice, soup, and vegetables, and people exercised by walking or doing simple stretches.
But these days, people now think about health in a much bigger way. Actually, now they go to the gym, eat balanced meals, and care about both their body and their mind.
The biggest difference is that health feels more like a full lifestyle now, not just eating well or sleeping enough.
Overall, I think people are probably healthier today, but as for me, I also notice that everyone seems to worry about health a lot more than before.

COM_INT_N_C1_06.text: Well, the internet has changed a lot since I first started using it.

In the past, the internet used to be really slow, and I remember waiting a long time just to open a single website. Another thing is, we had that loud dial-up sound, and we couldn't use the phone and the internet at the same time.
But these days, the internet is super fast and always connected. Now I can stream videos, download big files, and do everything in just a few seconds.
The biggest difference is that the speed has improved so much, and it's way more convenient now.
Overall, I think our lives have become much easier because of these changes.
As for me, I honestly couldn't imagine going back to the old slow internet anymore.

COM_PHA_N_C2_04.text: in the past, the pharmacy I went to as a child used to be small and kind of messy, with shelves that were a bit disorganized. Actually, you just told the pharmacist your problem, and they quickly gave you some medicine without much explanation.
But these days, pharmacies are much bigger, cleaner, and really well-organized. Now, they sell all kinds of health products, and the pharmacists take time to explain things in detail.
The biggest difference is that the service now feels way more professional and helpful compared to before.
as for me, I'm honestly glad about these changes because I feel much more comfortable asking questions and getting the right advice than I did back then.

COM_PHO_N_C1_05.text: Well, my first phone was really simple compared to the one I use now.
In the past, I used to have a small flip phone with a tiny screen and big buttons.
Actually, it could only make calls and send short texts, and that was pretty much everything it could do.
But these days, my phone is totally different. Now it’s a smartphone with a big touch screen, and I can do almost anything on it, like shop online, watch videos, or take high-quality pictures.
The biggest difference is that my current phone is basically a small computer, while my first phone was just for calling and texting.
Overall, it’s amazing how far phones have come.
As for me, I sometimes miss how simple my old phone was, but I love having all these new features now.

COM_RES_N_C2_10.text: in the past, there was a small family restaurant near my house that I remember from my childhood. It used to be pretty simple and old-fashioned, with wooden tables and a paper menu. You just sat down, ordered from the menu, and waited for your food to come out.
But these days, restaurants are much more modern and convenient. For example, now a lot of places have tablets for ordering and you can even pay with your phone, which is really fast.
The biggest difference is that everything is much quicker and more high-tech now compared to before.
as for me, I like the convenience of modern restaurants, but I honestly miss the cozy and warm feeling of those old places. They had a charm that’s hard to find today.

COM_TEC_N_C2_03.text: Well, technology has definitely changed a lot over the years.

In the past, the first computer my family had was really big, slow, and made a lot of noise. It used to take forever just to turn it on, and honestly, we could only do simple things like typing documents or playing really basic games.
But these days, computers are much thinner, super fast, and way more powerful. For example, now I can do almost anything in seconds, and laptops are light enough to carry everywhere.
The biggest difference is that technology is so much faster and more portable now compared to before.
Overall, it's pretty amazing to see how far things have come.
As for me, I can't even imagine going back to that old computer anymore.

COM_TRA_N_C2_03.text: Well, the way people traveled has really changed since I was a kid.
In the past, I mostly used the bus to get around, and everyone just waited at the bus stop not knowing exactly when the bus would arrive.
Actually, there weren't any apps or digital boards, so people just guessed the time and hoped for the best.
But these days, it's a whole new world. Now I can check real-time bus or subway schedules on my phone, and there are apps that let you call a taxi right away.
The biggest difference is that transportation is much more convenient and reliable now compared to before.
Overall, I think getting around the city is way less stressful now.
As for me, I really appreciate how easy it is to travel these days.

COM_WEA_N_C3_03.text: Well, the weather in my country has changed quite a bit over the years.
In the past, winters used to be really cold and we always had a lot of snow. For example, I remember wearing thick coats and playing outside in the snow almost every winter when I was a kid.
But these days, the weather is much warmer and the seasons are not as clear anymore. Now, winters are pretty mild and it hardly snows at all, while summers are much hotter than before.
The biggest difference is that the seasons don’t feel separate like they used to—they kind of blend together now.
Overall, I feel a bit worried about these changes.
As for me, I really miss the cold, snowy winters from my childhood.

COM_WOR_N_C2_02.text: Well, workplaces in my country have changed a lot over time.
In the past, people used to go to the office every day and had to work strict hours, usually from nine to six.
Actually, everything was done on paper back then, and meetings always happened face to face.
But these days, workplaces are much more flexible. Now, many people work from home and use online tools like video calls and shared documents to get things done.
The biggest difference is that people now have much more freedom about where and how they work.
Overall, as for me, I think this change is really positive because it saves time and makes work feel a lot more comfortable.

SEL_HIK_N_C1_09.text: Well, my physical condition has changed a lot since I started hiking.
In the past, before I got into hiking, I used to be pretty out of shape and would get tired really fast.
For example, even just climbing a few stairs made me feel out of breath and weak.
But these days, I feel much stronger and healthier. Now I can hike up a whole mountain without stopping too much, and I have a lot more energy every day.
The biggest difference is that my stamina is way better now than it was before.
Overall, as for me, I'm really happy I started hiking because it changed not just my body, but also my mood and lifestyle.

SEL_HOM_N6_05.text: Well, when I was a child, I used to live in a small house with my family, and it was pretty cozy but kind of cramped.
For example, I had to share a room with my sibling, so we didn’t really have much space or privacy.
But these days, I live in a bigger and more modern apartment. Now I have my own room, and the place feels much brighter and more open with lots of big windows.
The biggest difference is that I have a lot more personal space and privacy now compared to my childhood home.
Overall, I really enjoy my home these days.
As for me, I still have a lot of warm memories from that little house I grew up in, but I definitely prefer the comfort of my current place.

SEL_HOM_N6_06.text: in the past, I grew up in a quiet neighborhood with small houses and lots of open fields.
Actually, back then, kids could play outside all day, and the whole area felt really peaceful and slow.
But these days, the neighborhood is totally different. Now there are tall apartments, busy roads, and lots of new shops everywhere.
The biggest difference is that the place is much more crowded and developed now compared to before.
as for me, I have mixed feelings about this change.
It's definitely more convenient now, but I really miss the peaceful and open spaces from when I was young.

SEL_MUS_N_C2_03.text: in the past, when I was a kid, I used to be interested in whatever music was popular on TV, especially cheerful pop songs. Actually, I just liked catchy tunes and didn't really care about the lyrics or the meaning back then.
But these days, my interest in music has changed a lot. Now I enjoy calmer music, like soft ballads and some jazz, and I really pay attention to the words and the feelings in the songs.
The biggest difference is that I listen to music more deeply now, not just for fun, but to relax and understand myself better.
Overall, music has become a much bigger part of my life.
As for me, I think this change is pretty good because music helps me relax and reset whenever I feel stressed.

SEL_TV_N_C4_04.text: Well, TV shows have really changed since I was a kid.

In the past, I used to watch simple cartoons and family programs on just a few channels. For example, I had to wait all week for my favorite show to come on, and everyone in my family watched together at the same time.

But these days, TV is totally different. Now I can stream any show I want, whenever I want, on my phone or laptop. Another thing is, there are so many more choices now, and I can even watch shows by myself.
The biggest difference is that I don’t have to wait anymore—everything is available instantly and I can watch alone if I want.
Overall, I really like how convenient TV has become.
Personally, though, I sometimes miss the excitement of waiting for my favorite show each week.

SEL_TV_N_C4_05.text: Well, my interest in watching TV and movies has really changed over time.
In the past, when I was a kid, I used to watch cartoons and simple shows just for fun. I didn’t care about the story or the message back then; I just wanted something entertaining to pass the time.
But these days, I’m much more interested in movies and TV shows with deep stories and interesting characters. For example, I now enjoy dramas and films that make me think or feel something special.
The biggest difference is that I watch things for the story and meaning now, not just for entertainment.
Overall, watching movies has become one of my favorite hobbies.
As for me, I think it’s a great way to relax and escape from daily stress.

COM_FAM_A_C6_01.text: Well, I have two close friends who are quite different from each other.
In the past, my quiet friend used to spend most of his time at home, reading books or relaxing by himself. He wasn't really interested in meeting new people or going out to busy places.

But these days, my other friend is the complete opposite. She now loves going to parties, meeting new people, and she's always full of energy. For example, she often organizes group events and encourages everyone to join.
The biggest difference is that one friend is calm and prefers quiet activities, while the other is outgoing and enjoys being around lots of people.
Overall, even though their personalities are really different, they're both very kind and supportive to me.
As for me, I feel a bit closer to the quiet friend, since I'm pretty calm too.

COM_FOO_A_C6_01.text: Well, food shopping has changed a lot over the last 20 years.

In the past, people used to go to local markets or grocery stores to buy everything they needed. Actually, it took a lot of time because you had to walk around, carry heavy bags, and wait in long lines.
But these days, most people now order their groceries online. For example, I can just use an app to pick out what I want, and everything gets delivered right to my door.
The biggest difference is that shopping is much more convenient now and it saves a lot of time.
Overall, I think this change has made life easier for everyone.
As for me, I sometimes miss the feeling of walking around the market, but I really enjoy how simple and fast shopping is now.

COM_GAT_A_C4_01.text: Well, celebrations and gatherings have really changed a lot since I was a child.

In the past, people used to have big family events mainly at home, like birthdays or holidays, and most of the time everyone just gathered in someone’s living room. Actually, there weren’t that many parties, and they felt a bit more formal and special.

But these days, people now celebrate all sorts of things, and it’s pretty common to go out to restaurants or cafes instead of staying at home. For example, small get-togethers with friends or themed parties are much more popular now.
The biggest difference is that gatherings are more casual and happen more often now, which makes them feel less formal than before.
Overall, as for me, I think it’s a nice change because people can enjoy spending time together more easily now.
Overall, as for me, I think it’s a nice change because people can enjoy spending time together more easily now.

COM_GAT_A_C4_02.text: in the past, celebrations in small towns used to be really close-knit and simple. People would gather outside, and everyone in the neighborhood joined, so it felt like one big family.

But these days, in big cities, celebrations now are much bigger but also more private. For example, people tend to celebrate in restaurants or clubs just with their own group of friends, and they don't really know their neighbors.
The biggest difference is that small towns used to have a warm, open feeling, while big city celebrations now feel more personal and a bit distant.
both have their own charm, but as for me, I personally prefer the small-town style because it feels friendlier and more relaxed.

COM_GEO_A_C5_01.text: Well, there's a country near my home country that has really changed a lot over time.
In the past, it used to be a pretty quiet place, and not many people visited. Its cities were smaller and honestly, there weren't many big companies or tall buildings back then.
But these days, it now has huge modern cities, lots of tourists, and a really strong economy. For example, you can see new shopping malls and skyscrapers everywhere.
The biggest difference is that it feels so much busier and more exciting now compared to before.
Overall, it's pretty amazing to see how fast a country can develop in just a few years.
As for me, I'd love to visit there someday and experience the changes myself.

COM_GEO_A_C5_02.text: in the past, the relationship between my country and other countries used to be pretty limited. Back then, not many people traveled abroad, and our culture wasn't really known outside, so things felt a bit closed off.

But these days, everything is so connected. Now our music, movies, and food are popular all over the world, and tons of tourists come to visit every year. Actually, it's easy to meet foreigners almost anywhere now, and there are lots of international events happening here.
The biggest difference is that my country feels way more open and global now compared to before.
Overall, I'm really proud of how things have changed.
As for me, it's great to see people everywhere enjoying our culture and wanting to learn more about us.

COM_HEA_A_C6_01.text: Well, in the past, my parents’ generation used to think that being healthy just meant being skinny.
For example, they believed that if you looked thin, you were healthy enough, and they didn’t really care much about things like working out or building muscle.
But these days, my generation now sees health in a different way.
Actually, we think it’s important to be strong and fit, so a lot of people my age go to the gym and try to build muscles, not just lose weight.
The biggest difference is that the older generation focused on being slim, while we care more about being strong and active.
Overall, both generations just want to be healthy, but as for me, I prefer our way because I think being strong feels better than just being skinny.
but as for me, I prefer our way because I think being strong feels better than just being skinny.

COM_HEA_A_C6_02.text: in the past, people used to stay in good shape mostly by playing outside with friends. For example, they often played soccer or basketball at the park, and gyms really weren’t common, so most people just went for a run or did simple exercises outdoors.
But these days, people now usually go to the gym to work out. Actually, there are fitness centers everywhere, and many people even follow workout videos at home.
The biggest difference is that fitness is much more organized and convenient now, so it’s easier for everyone to find a way to exercise.
as for me, I think this change is really positive, because now anyone can stay healthy in a way that fits their lifestyle.

COM_HIK_A_C1_01.text: in the past, people in my country used to hike a lot less than they do now. Back then, hiking was mostly something older people enjoyed, and younger people usually didn't go hiking much, so the trails were pretty quiet except for a few regulars.

But these days, hiking is way more popular. Now, you see people of all ages on the trails, especially on weekends, and it feels like everyone is getting into it. Actually, it's become kind of trendy and a lot of people now post about their hikes online.
The biggest difference is that hiking has turned into a fun social activity for everyone, not just a hobby for older folks.
I think people started hiking more because it's a great way to relax and spend time outdoors. As for me, I really enjoy hiking now too, because it helps me clear my head after a busy week.

COM_HIK_A_C1_03.text: Well, in the past, I used to think hiking and trekking were almost the same, but I learned there are some key differences.
Hiking was usually something people did for just a few hours on a small mountain near their home, and you only needed simple things like comfortable shoes and a water bottle.

But these days, I know that trekking is a lot tougher. Actually, trekking now means going on a long journey, sometimes for several days, and people often travel to remote places with big mountains. You need more equipment, like a tent, special clothes, and a heavy backpack.
The biggest difference is that trekking is much longer and harder than hiking, and it needs more preparation.
Overall, both activities help you enjoy nature and get exercise, but as for me, I prefer hiking because it's easier and fits better with my busy life.
as for me, I prefer hiking because it's easier and fits better with my busy life.

COM_HIK_A_C1_04.text: Well, hiking gear has changed a lot over time.
In the past, people used to hike with really basic equipment. For example, they usually wore regular sneakers and just carried a simple backpack, so nothing was designed especially for hiking.
But these days, hiking gear is much more advanced. Now people have special hiking boots, lightweight jackets, walking poles, and even smart watches to track their steps.
The biggest difference is that the gear today is more comfortable and safer, which makes hiking easier and more enjoyable.

Overall, I think people are more interested in getting good gear now, and as for me, I actually enjoy checking out new equipment before I go hiking. So yeah, better gear has made hiking more fun for everyone.

COM_HOM_A2_01.text: Well, home appliances have really changed our daily life.
In the past, people used to do most chores by hand. For example, we had to wash clothes, clean the floors, and cook everything ourselves, so housework took a lot of time and energy.
But these days, we have all kinds of smart devices. Now there are robot vacuums, dishwashers, and washing machines that do the work for us.
The biggest difference is that chores are way easier and faster now because of these new appliances.
Overall, I think these devices have given us so much free time.
As for me, I can finish my housework quickly and just relax, which is really nice.

COM_HOM_A2_03.text: Well, in the past, life without home appliances used to be much harder.

People had to do all the chores by hand, like washing clothes and dishes, which took a lot of time and effort. Actually, housework was a big part of daily life, and families spent hours just keeping things clean.
But these days, home appliances now make everything much easier. For example, I can just use a washing machine or a microwave, and it saves me so much time.
The biggest difference is that we have a lot more free time and our lives are much more comfortable now.
Overall, I think home appliances really changed our lives for the better.
Personally, I'm really grateful for them because they give me more time to relax and do things I enjoy.

COM_IND_A_C5_01.text: Well, one industry I follow is the food delivery business, and it has changed a lot.
In the past, food delivery used to be pretty basic. You could only order from a few nearby restaurants, and it often took a long time for your food to arrive.
But these days, the whole experience is much more advanced. Now there are tons of apps, and you can order almost any kind of food and track your order right on your phone.
Actually, you can even see exactly when your food will get to your door.
The biggest difference is that it's way faster and easier now, with so many more choices than before.
Overall, it's amazing how quickly this industry has grown.
As for me, I use these apps all the time now, way more than I did before, and I really enjoy the convenience.

COM_IND_A_C5_02.text: in the past, people in my country used to focus mainly on general education before starting work. They usually studied at school and only got specific job training after they joined a company, so everything started pretty late.
But these days, things have really changed. Now, a lot of people get specific training much earlier, for example, through online courses or special programs even while they're still students.
The biggest difference is that people prepare for their careers much sooner and in a more practical way now.
I think this is a good change because, as for me, it helps people feel a lot more ready and confident when they start their first job.

COM_INT_A_C7_02.text: Well, the way I surf the internet has really changed over time.
In the past, using the internet used to be pretty slow and I had to sit at a big desktop computer.
For example, web pages took a long time to load and I couldn't really do much at once.
But these days, the internet is super fast and I mostly use my smartphone. Now I can open apps, watch videos, and search for things instantly wherever I am.
The biggest difference is that everything is so much quicker and more convenient now.
Overall, I still use the internet for searching and entertainment, but it's just way easier.
As for me, I definitely enjoy using the internet more now because it saves me a lot of time and is more fun.

COM_INT_A_C7_03.text: in the past, older people used to use the internet mostly for simple things like reading the news or sending emails, and they didn’t spend much time online.

But these days, younger people now use the internet for almost everything. Actually, they watch videos, play games, chat with friends, and even shop online, so it’s a really big part of their daily lives.
The biggest difference is that younger people use the internet for a lot more activities and spend much more time online compared to older people, who still use it in a more basic way.
Overall, everyone uses the internet to stay connected in some way.
As for me, I think it’s pretty cool that people of all ages can enjoy the internet, even if they use it differently.

COM_PHO_A_C3_01.text: Well, the way people use cell phones has really changed a lot in just a few years.

In the past, people used to use their phones for much simpler things. For example, we mostly made calls, sent texts, and maybe used a few basic apps, so phones weren't that powerful. I remember my old phone had a small screen and got slow pretty quickly.
But these days, phones now do almost everything. Actually, we can shop, work, watch movies, and even pay for things, all on one device.
The biggest difference is that a phone is like a small computer now, not just for talking or texting.
Overall, as for me, I honestly can't imagine going back to how things were before.

COM_PHO_A_C3_02.text: Well, phones have changed a lot over the years.

In the past, phones used to be really simple and mostly just for making calls or sending texts. For example, they had small screens and couldn’t even connect to the internet, so people just used them for basic things.
But these days, phones now do so much more. Actually, we can shop online, watch videos, and even work from our phones whenever we want.
The biggest difference is that now a phone is like a small computer you can carry in your pocket.
Overall, I think these changes made it much easier to stay connected.
As for me, I really like how I can talk to anyone at any time, no matter where they are. Life honestly feels more convenient now.

COM_PHO_A_C3_03.text: Well, the way I use my phone to find information has really changed over time.

In the past, my phone used to be pretty basic. Actually, when I first started using a phone, I couldn't look things up on it, so I had to ask people for directions or use a computer at home to search for anything important.
But these days, my phone is super helpful. Now I can check maps, read restaurant reviews, and find any information I need instantly, no matter where I am.
The biggest difference is that now I have all the answers right in my pocket, and it only takes a few seconds to find what I want.
Overall, I think this change is great.
Personally, I feel a lot more confident and independent because I can always rely on my phone to help me out.

COM_REC_A_C6_01.text: Well, the way recycling was collected has really changed over time.
In the past, people used to just throw all their trash together without separating anything. Actually, there weren't any special bins or clear rules, so everything just ended up in the same place.
But these days, recycling is much more organized. Now, people separate their trash into paper, plastic, glass, and food waste, and there are strict guidelines to follow.
The biggest difference is that people are much more careful and aware about recycling now compared to before.
Overall, I think this change is really positive.
As for me, I feel good about doing my part for the environment, and it honestly doesn't take much effort.

COM_REC_A_C6_02.text: Well, people's attitude toward recycling has really changed since I was a child.
In the past, people didn't care much about it. For example, most of us just threw everything in the garbage, and we didn't really think it mattered.
But these days, almost everyone recycles. Now people separate their trash carefully, and they actually feel bad if they don't do it right.
The biggest difference is that recycling has become a normal habit now, instead of something we ignored before.
Overall, I'm glad people's minds have changed.
As for me, I think we all care about the environment a lot more now, and that's a really positive thing.

COM_RES_A_C7_01.text: Well, restaurants have really changed a lot when it comes to healthy food.
In the past, most places used to serve pretty heavy meals, and actually, they didn't really offer light or healthy options, so it was hard to eat clean when going out.
But these days, a lot of restaurants now offer healthier choices. For example, you can easily find salads, low-fat meals, and dishes with fresh vegetables on almost any menu.
The biggest difference is that eating out feels much healthier now compared to before, and there are way more options for people who care about their health.
Overall, as for me, I think this is a great change because I care about eating healthy, and it's nice to have tasty options that are good for you too.

COM_RES_A_C7_02.text: Well, eating out has really changed a lot over the past few years.

In the past, going to a restaurant used to be pretty simple. For example, we just looked at a paper menu, ordered from a waiter, and usually paid with cash, so the whole process was slower and more old-fashioned.
But these days, restaurants now feel much more modern. Actually, we usually order on a tablet or an app, pay with our phones, and sometimes even see robots bringing food to the table.
The biggest difference is that everything is much faster and more high-tech now, which makes the experience feel totally different.
Overall, I think these changes happened because people want things to be quick and easy.
As for me, I really like how convenient eating out is these days.

COM_RES_A_C7_03.text: Well, fast-food restaurants have really changed a lot over time.
In the past, fast food used to be all about cheap, filling meals like burgers and fries, and honestly, nobody really cared about healthy options back then.
But these days, even fast-food places now offer healthier choices. For example, you can find salads, grilled chicken, and lighter meals on the menu now, which is pretty different from before.
The biggest difference is that people can eat fast food without feeling as guilty about their health.
Overall, I think this change mainly happened because customers wanted it.
As for me, I think it's great that restaurants are listening to what people want and making better options for everyone.

COM_RES_A_C7_04.text: in the past, I mostly went to chain restaurants like McDonald's because I used to like knowing exactly what to expect. The menu and prices were always the same, so it felt pretty safe and simple.
But these days, I now visit small local restaurants more often. Actually, local places usually have unique dishes and the owners are really friendly, so the atmosphere feels warmer and more personal.
The biggest difference is that chains are super consistent, but local restaurants have more character and offer a special experience every time.
Overall, both have their own good points.
As for me, I prefer local restaurants now because the food tastes more homemade and the place feels like a second home.

SEL_CAF_A_C1_02.text: Well, cafes have really changed over the past few years.
In the past, a cafe used to be a simple place just for coffee, and people mostly went there to grab a drink and chat for a bit.
For example, the design was pretty plain and there weren't many extra things.
